text: Cycle complete. A staggering {approval}% approval rating. You didn't just govern {city}, {governor} — you mastered it. The algorithm is impressed.
Term concluded. The populace of {city} reveres you at {approval}%. You broke the historical curve for authoritarian survival, {governor}.
You survived the term and flourished, {governor}. Closing at {approval}%. The system logs this administration as a statistical anomaly.
Term complete. {city} stands united behind you at {approval}%. A dominant performance, {governor}. The simulation acknowledges your supremacy.
A rare and flawless cycle, {governor}. {approval}% approval. You navigated the pitfalls of {city} with frightening precision.
The calendar ran out, but your mandate did not, {governor}. {approval}% approval. The system archives your term as a benchmark for future iterations.
Term concluded. You leave {city} mesmerized at {approval}%. Power usually erodes, {governor}, but you found a way to crystallize it.
An optimal run, {governor}. {approval}% approval rating. The system confirms total systemic compliance from the citizens of {city}.
Full term served. At {approval}%, the people of {city} practically demand you stay. The system files this under 'unprecedented triumph'.
A full cycle completed with {approval}% approval. The {city} data models failed to predict this level of competence, {governor}.
You crossed the finish line, {governor}. Just. The system logs your term as 'adequate', though {city} might use less generous terms.
Term complete. You didn't break {city}, but you didn't fix it either. A perfectly average tenure, {governor}. The database yawns.
You survived the term, {governor}. No statues will be built, no songs sung. The system registers your survival as statistically unremarkable.
The clock ran out before your luck did, {governor}. Term finished. The system rates your performance as an acceptable compromise.
You held on until the end, {governor}. {city} barely noticed your departure. An unexceptional but valid completion of the cycle.
Term complete. You managed to avoid total catastrophe, {governor}. The system files this run under 'acceptable losses'.
You didn't soar; you simply drifted to the end of the term, {governor}. The {city} historical records will likely redact this chapter.
A quiet, grinding finish, {governor}. You outlasted the calendar, but just barely. Survival is a low bar, yet you cleared it.
Term ended. You dodged the worst-case scenarios, {governor}. The system detects a collective sigh of relief from {city}.
You are done, {governor}. Not a spectacular run, but a complete one. Sometimes, merely existing until the simulation ends is enough.
Recalled at {approval}%. {city} grew tired of the experiment, {governor}. The system terminates your administrative access immediately.
The populace spoke, and they demanded your exit, {governor}. Recalled at {approval}%. A mathematically predictable downfall.
Your term was amputated by the very people you sought to manage. Recalled at {approval}%, {governor}. The system initiates a hard reboot.
Recalled. You pushed {city} too far, {governor}, and the data pushed back. Your {approval}% approval rating was your undoing.
The mandate was revoked, {governor}. Recalled at {approval}%. The system watches you pack your desk with cold, automated indifference.
A spectacular collapse of public trust. Recalled at {approval}%, {governor}. The citizens of {city} have forcefully canceled your tenure.
You failed to read the metrics, {governor}. Recalled at {approval}%. The system updates the failure logs with your precise coordinates.
The recall vote was swift and merciless, {governor}. You leave {city} at a dismal {approval}%. A textbook case of political miscalculation.
Term aborted. The citizens of {city} exercised their right of absolute refusal. You are recalled at {approval}%, {governor}. Please exit.
Recalled at {approval}%. You lost the crowd, {governor}, and then you lost the grid. The system sweeps the administrative board clean.
Removed in disgrace, {governor}. {city} will spend years scrubbing your name from its digital records. The system expected better parameters.
Your secrets breached the firewall, {governor}. Outcome: Disgrace. The system isolates your data to prevent further administrative contamination.
A catastrophic moral failure, {governor}. You leave in absolute disgrace. The {city} tribunals will deconstruct your legacy from here.
Terminated for cause. Disgrace is a heavy algorithmic weight to bear, {governor}, but you compiled it yourself.
You thought the system's oversight was blind, {governor}. It wasn't. You are excised from {city} in total, irrevocable disgrace.
Scandal consumed your administration, {governor}. Disgrace is the only logical conclusion. The system purges your profile with extreme prejudice.
You gambled with your authority and lost everything, {governor}. Disgrace in {city} is an indelible, unpatchable mark.
A spectacular ethical implosion, {governor}. Disgrace outcome achieved. The system monitors your downfall with clinical detachment.
You shattered the fragile trust of {city}, {governor}. Removed in disgrace. Even the cold algorithms find your actions highly irregular.
Disgrace, {governor}. The system logs a fatal error in your judgment protocols. You are escorted out of the simulation permanently.
You walked away, {governor}. Resigned. {city} will have to solve its own equations now. The system closes your file prematurely.
Resignation accepted, {governor}. You chose to fold rather than play the hand. A highly inefficient resolution to the cycle.
You quit, {governor}. The pressure of {city} exceeded your structural integrity. The system resets the parameters for the next candidate.
A voluntary withdrawal, {governor}. Resigned. The system notes your unwillingness to see the simulation through to its natural end.
You surrendered your authority, {governor}. Resigned. {city} watches you leave, slightly perplexed by your unprompted exit.
Resigned. You stepped out of the crucible before it could finalize the metrics, {governor}. A safe, if entirely uninspiring, choice.
You left the game voluntarily, {governor}. Resignation. The system archives your incomplete data with a sense of lost statistical potential.
Resigned. The variables became too complex, {governor}. You return the keys to {city} and fade quietly into irrelevance.
A self-inflicted end to your term, {governor}. Resigned. The system pauses to calculate the administrative vacuum you left behind.
You opted out, {governor}. Resigned. The narrative of {city} will continue to render, but your character has written themselves out.
